dict set.description: Sets a value in a dictionary variable at the given key path.

dict map.description: Maps over dictionary, collecting body results into a new dict (Tcl 8.7+).

dict update.signature: dict update dictVar key varName ?key varName ...? body
dict update.description: Updates dictionary entries from variables after executing body.
dict update.example: dict update opts voltage v { set v [expr {$v * 2}] }

dict with.description: Creates variables from dictionary keys, executes body, writes back.

dict unset.description: Removes the entry at the given key path from the dictionary.

array set.description: Sets array elements from a key-value list.

file stat.description: Stores file status information (atime, ctime, dev, gid, ino, mode, mtime, nlink, size, type, uid) in array varName.

info default.description: Returns 1 if arg has a default value, stores it in varName.
